name: atp-kernel
description: ATP Kernel — reference implementation of the Activity Travel Protocol

_build_sequence._note: Do not skip steps. See CLAUDE.md for full build sequence details.
_build_sequence.step_1: PostgreSQL schema — packages/adapters (IEventLog, PostgresEventLog, schema migrations)
_build_sequence.step_2: Party Registry — packages/core (in-memory store, Ed25519, regulatory_class)
_build_sequence.step_3: XState v5 state machine — packages/core (11 states, 8 IN_JOURNEY phases, guards)
_build_sequence.step_4: Security Kernel skeleton — packages/security (5-step path, mandate validation stub)
_build_sequence.step_5: Cedar policy evaluation — packages/security (3 policy sets, Cedarling WASM)
_build_sequence.step_6: ATP Mandate Model — packages/security (Ed25519 JWT, narrowing property)
_build_sequence.step_8: REST API — packages/core (17 OpenAPI 3.1 endpoints, ATPRuntime binding)
_build_sequence.step_10: BOOKING_SUSPENDED — packages/core + packages/workflow (XState parallel state, HEM)
